cases.text: 在折扣语境中，“七五折”表示顾客支付原价的75%，也就是优惠25%。
In a discount context, '75% of the original price' means the customer pays 75% and receives 25% off.
In a discount context, '25% off' means the customer pays 75% of the original price.
在折扣语境中，“优惠25%”表示减去原价的25%，顾客支付75%。
In a discount context, '75% off' means the customer pays 25% of the original price.
在折扣语境中，“优惠75%”表示减去原价的75%，顾客支付25%。
在折扣语境中，“打八折”表示顾客支付原价的80%，也就是优惠20%。
In a discount context, '80% of the original price' means the customer pays 80% and receives 20% off.
In a discount context, '20% off' means the customer pays 80% of the original price.
In a discount context, '80% discount' means the customer pays 20% of the original price.
在求导语境中，“(3x)'=3”是因为 x 的导数是1，系数3保留。
In differentiation, '(3x)' = 3' because the derivative of x is 1 and the coefficient 3 is preserved.
错误说法：“3x是常数，所以(3x)'=0”。这里把线性项误当作常数。
Wrong rule: '3x is a constant, so (3x)' = 0.' This mistakes a linear term for a constant.

model_spec.loader_risk: conditional_generation_or_multimodal; may require AutoModelForImageTextToText/AutoProcessor rather than AutoModelForCausalLM
model_spec.notes: latest small Qwen candidate; architecture may differ from standard Transformer
